home.designedP1: At Yolitia Academy, we believe education should go beyond information.
home.designedP2: Our programs are designed to help you truly understand the human mind, emotions, and behavior — not just from theory, but through real-life application.

designedItems: Integrative approach: mind, body, and emotion

nosotros.heroTitle: A Different Way to Understand the Human Mind
nosotros.heroDesc: Yolitia Academy was created to go beyond traditional education — offering a deeper, more human approach to learning, growth, and transformation.
nosotros.missionDesc: To provide accessible, high-quality education in psychology, mental health, and human development through programs that combine knowledge, reflection, and practical application. We are committed to supporting students in their academic, personal, and professional growth with an approach rooted in empathy, ethics, and human transformation.
nosotros.visionDesc: To become a trusted educational reference in psychology and mental health for learners in the United States and Latin America by offering innovative, meaningful, and deeply human programs that prepare professionals to create positive impact in individuals, families, and communities.
nosotros.historyTitle: Built from real experience, not abstraction alone
nosotros.educationGapLabel: Why Traditional Education Often Falls Short
nosotros.educationGapSub: Many programs teach concepts. Few prepare people to truly understand human experience.
nosotros.historyP1: In many academic settings, education is centered on theory, terminology, and technical frameworks. While those elements are important, they often leave students and professionals with a gap between what they know and what they are actually able to understand, apply, and embody in real situations.
nosotros.historyP2: When working with people, emotions, trauma, behavior, or personal development, information alone is not enough. True understanding requires reflection, sensitivity, context, and the ability to connect knowledge with real human processes. That is the gap Yolitia Academy was created to address.
nosotros.valuesTitle: Learning becomes powerful when it is understood, integrated, and lived

values.title: Human-centered learning
values.desc: We believe education should honor the full human experience, not just technical concepts.

values.title: Practical and reflective education
values.desc: Real learning happens when ideas are explored deeply, questioned honestly, and applied with intention.

values.title: Integration of mind, emotions, and behavior
values.desc: The mind, body, emotions, and relationships are interconnected. Our education reflects that complexity.

values.title: Real-world application
values.desc: Practical tools that support personal and professional growth with clarity and purpose.

nosotros.teamLabel: Learn from professionals with real human insight

team.bio: Dr. Gerardo Wence leads Yolitia Academy with a vision centered on meaningful education, emotional understanding, and professional growth. His work is guided by the belief that learning in the counseling and mental health field should be both rigorous and deeply human.

nosotros.whoWeServeTitle: A space for learners who want to go deeper

nosotros.ctaTitle: Start Your Learning Journey with Yolitia Academy
nosotros.ctaDesc: Whether you are beginning your path or expanding your professional practice, Yolitia Academy offers a space where education becomes more than knowledge — it becomes direction, clarity, and transformation.

contacto.title: Contact us
contacto.sub: At Yolitia Academy, we're here to answer your questions, guide you through our courses, and support your professional growth. Whether you'd like more information about enrollment, payments, or available programs, our team is ready to listen and assist you.
contacto.formSub: We respond within 24 hours on business days.
contacto.formPrivacy: I accept the privacy policy and the use of my data to respond to this inquiry.
contacto.formDemo: Demo form — connect your email provider to activate it.
contacto.responseDesc: Average response time is 4 hours on business days. For urgent matters, message us on WhatsApp.

faq.a: Yes, all our courses offer CEUs approved by NASW, NBCC, CAMFT and other organizations. Each course indicates the number of CEUs and the organizations that recognize it.

faq.q: Can I access from any country?
faq.a: Absolutely. Our courses are available online and you can access them from any device with internet connection, anywhere in the world.

faq.q: Do you have a money-back guarantee?
faq.a: Yes. If within the first 30 days you are not satisfied with the course, we will refund 100% of your investment, no questions asked.

faq.q: How long do I have access to the material?
faq.a: Access is lifetime. Once enrolled, you can return to the material as many times as you want with no time limit.

faq.q: Are there group discounts for institutions?
faq.a: Yes. We offer institutional plans with discounts for groups of 5 or more people. Contact us to receive a personalized quote.
